3335940.name: Completely Stretchy Soundtrack
3335940.description:
Lifting the vibrant world of the Grombi Isles, the Completely Stretchy Soundtrack consists of both score and in-world music spanning from stretchy grooves and gurgles to expansive ambiences that will surprise and delight with each track.

Covering a broad stylistic ground, the music from the game is designed to accompany the curious and light-hearted 3D platforming journey of Stretchy - a blue Gombi exploring his not-so-regular home. Expect drippy synths, psychedelic guitars, tongue-in-cheek melodies and fruity rhythms to tickle the brain. Now, get exploring - swing, glide and (importantly) groove!
